case_title: ISMEL F OSTOLAZA VS. PRAAADNAYA SHAH

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION CHANGE OF ADDRESS AND PHONE NUMBER (OF DEFENDANT'S). (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSTOLAZA, ISMEL F
ORDER CASED CONTINUED FOR CURING UNTIMELY PROOF OF SERVICE AND CURING UNTIMELY FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-30-2023 - CONTINUED FOR CURING UNTIMELY PROOF AND SERVICE AND CURING UNTIMELY FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-13-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ISMEL F OSTOLAZA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PRAAADNAYA SHAH IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STATES IN COURT THAT THE PROOF OF SERVICE WAS SERVED YESTERDAY, 1-29-2023 AND IT WAS FILED WITH THE COURT TODAY. PLAINTIFF SUBMITS DECLARATION CHANGE OF DEFENDANT'S ADDRESS (NO APARTMENT NUMBER STATED BY PLAINTIFF) AND PHONE NUMBER, UPDATED IN THE SYSTEM BY COURTROOM CLERK. PROOF OF SERVICE SERVED ON 1-29-2023 IS UNTIMELY AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED DATE OF 1-30-2023 IS UNTIMELY. CONTINUED THE MATTER FOR CURING UNTIMELY PROOF OF SERVICE AND CURING UNTIMELY FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE TO MARCH 13, 2023 AT 1:30 P.M.. ALL PARTIES MUST APPEAR TO BE HEARD. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MURLENE J. RANDLE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $50. SERVED JAN-29-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SHAH, PRAAADNAYA

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF ISMEL F. OSTOLAZA IS NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT PRAAADNAYA SHAH. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE FEB-09-2023 CONTINUE ORDER MAIL TO PRAAADNAYA SHAH(ENOVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN UNABLE TO FORWARD)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-13-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO APR-14-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY OSTOLAZA, ISMEL F AS TO DEFENDANT SHAH, PRAAADNAYA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-30-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
